title: A heavy bold P where the bowl counter is a perfect square rather than the standard D-curve. The round outer bowl represents organic business complexity; the square counter shows compile-time precision imposed inside it. The square also sharply differentiates from Prefect's standard rounded P mark.
conceptualBridge: The square-counter P means precision inside complexity because the contract imposes exact structure within messy domain shapes.
decision: Shortlisted for a strong letterform with a specific precision cue that differentiates it from generic rounded P marks.
